task: Build a Redis-backed rate limiter in Go with sliding window algorithm

gemini-2.0-flash.code:
func (r *RateLimiter) Allow(ctx context.Context, key string) (bool, error) {
  now := time.Now().UnixNano()
  windowStart := now - r.window.Nanoseconds()
  
  p := r.redis.Pipeline()
  p.ZRemRangeByScore(ctx, key, "0", strconv.FormatInt(windowStart, 10))
  p.ZAdd(ctx, key, &redis.Z{Score: float64(now), Member: now})
  p.ZCard(ctx, key)
  p.Expire(ctx, key, r.window)
  
  cmds, err := p.Exec(ctx)
  if err != nil { return false, err }
  
  count := cmds[2].(*redis.IntCmd).Val()
  return count <= int64(r.limit), nil
}
